info.description: API for the Reverse Marketplace platform
info.title: Reverse Marketplace API

endsAt.description: When the banner expires. Null/omitted = open-ended.

message.description: Banner text shown to users (follow RUNBOOK_OPS.md §2 wording rules)

startsAt.description: When the banner becomes active. Defaults to now.

parameters.description: Filter by resource type (e.g. user, post, transaction)
parameters.name: resourceType

action.description: Approve or reject the category request

rejectionReason.description: Required when rejecting — reason for rejection

resolutionSummary.description: Summary of the resolution decision (min 10 chars)

action.description: Approve or reject the flagged content
Approve or reject the flagged content

post.description: Take down a copyrighted image from a post and strike the uploader

imageUrl.description: Exact photo URL from the post to take down

postId.description: Post the infringing image is attached to

reason.description: Optional takedown reason for the audit trail

expiresAt.description: Credential expiry date the admin approves (ISO 8601)

rejectionReason.description: Required when rejecting — reason for rejection

post.description: Request a password reset link via email

email.description: Email to send reset link to (e.g. buyer@test.com)

post.description: Log in with email and password
Refresh access token using a refresh token

accountType.description: Account role: buyer, seller, or both

agreeToPrivacy.description: Must be true — agree to Privacy Policy

agreeToTerms.description: Must be true — agree to Terms of Service

businessName.description: Legal business name. Required when isBusiness=true.

businessType.description: Business entity type. Required when isBusiness=true.

ein.description: Employer Identification Number (XX-XXXXXXX). Required when isBusiness=true.

isBusiness.description: True for business accounts — requires a valid EIN

password.description: Min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, 1 special (e.g. TestPassword123!)

salesTaxCertificateUrl.description: R2 URL of uploaded sales-tax certificate. Optional at register time — the upload endpoint requires auth, so the cert is attached post-registration via POST /users/me/upgrade-to-business. Publishing listings is gated until it is uploaded and submitted for verification (see posts.service).

email.description: Email to resend verification to (e.g. buyer@test.com)

post.description: Reset password using token from email link

get.description: Verify email address using token from email link

parameters.description: Only MVP categories — Products, Services, Jobs (default: false)
parameters.name: mvpOnly

post.description: File a dispute on a transaction

description.description: Detailed description of the dispute (min 20 chars)

disputeType.description: Dispute type (e.g. quality_issue, not_as_described, non_delivery, communication)

url.description: URL to evidence file (required for non-text types)

transactionId.description: UUID of the transaction to dispute

get.description: List your disputes as buyer or seller

url.description: URL to evidence file (required for non-text types)

reason.description: Reason for appealing the resolved dispute (min 20 chars)

post.description: Submit evidence for an open dispute

url.description: URL to evidence file (required for non-text types)

delete.description: Delete (hide) conversation for the current user

messageText.description: Message text (e.g. Hi, I have a question about your offer)

canStart.description: When you can start (e.g. Within 2 hours, Tomorrow)

completionTime.description: Estimated completion time (e.g. Same day, 3-5 days)

message.description: Optional pitch to the buyer — explain your qualifications and approach

offerType.description: Type of offer matching the post category

postId.description: UUID of the post to submit offer for

terms.description: Terms and conditions for the work

post.description: Counter an offer with new terms
Decline an offer without accepting another
Reconfirm offer after post was edited

transactionId.description: UUID of the transaction to pay for

reason.description: Reason for refund (min 10 chars if provided)

transactionId.description: UUID of the transaction to refund

get.description: List your payouts as a seller
Get your earnings summary (total earned, pending, in transit)

budgetType.description: Budget type: range, open, or fixed

categoryId.description: UUID of the category (get from GET /categories)

description.description: Detailed description of your request (min 20 chars)

expiresInHours.description: Hours until expiry (default 720 = 30 days, max 2160 = 90 days)

marketplaceContext.description: Marketplace context (defaults to user's active context)

subcategoryId.description: UUID of subcategory under the selected category (required)

title.description: What you need (e.g. Need a plumber for kitchen sink repair)

profileType.description: Are you looking for work or hiring?

text.description: Describe the job or your experience (e.g. Looking for a senior React developer with 5 years experience)

post.description: Parse natural language into structured post

text.description: Natural language description of what you need (e.g. I need someone to fix my leaking kitchen sink in Dallas, budget around $200)

productName.description: Product name to find images for (e.g. iPhone 15 Pro)

get.description: Buyer discovery feed (posts with offers to engage)

parameters.description: Search center latitude (defaults to buyer location)
parameters.name: latitude

parameters.description: Search center longitude (defaults to buyer location)
parameters.name: longitude

parameters.description: Filter by marketplace context (defaults to request context)
parameters.name: marketplaceContext

parameters.description: Sort order: newest | expiring_soon | budget_high | budget_low | closest (requires lat/lng)
parameters.name: sort

post.description: Create your own real post from a discovery offer ("request a quote like this")

offerId.description: UUID of the discovery offer being engaged

title.description: Editable title (defaults to the seed post title if omitted)

subcategoryId.description: New subcategory UUID (cannot be cleared once set)

reason.description: Reason for reporting this review (min 10 chars)

post.description: Create a new saved search with notification preferences

filters.description: Search filter criteria as JSON object

name.description: Name for this saved search (e.g. "Plumbing in Dallas")

notificationsEnabled.description: Receive notifications when new results match

searchType.description: Type of results to search for

isActive.description: Activate or deactivate this saved search

post.description: Save a seller to your favorites

bio.description: Business bio (e.g. Licensed plumber serving DFW for 10 years)

businessHours.description: Business hours by day of week

categories.description: Array of category UUIDs you serve

get.description: Get verification requirements for the requested subcategories

post.description: Start a Stripe Identity verification session for the ID Verified badge

get.description: Get seller profile by user ID

afterPhotos.description: After photos showing completed work (required, min 1)

meetupLocation.description: Meetup address (e.g. 123 Main St, Dallas, TX)

delete.description: Delete an uploaded file by its R2 key

parameters.description: The R2 object key to delete (e.g. post-photos/userId/uuid.jpg)
parameters.name: key

post.description: Generate a presigned URL for direct file upload to Cloudflare R2

category.description: Upload category determines storage path and validation rules

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file bytes — enables server-side dedup

contentLength.description: Exact byte size of the file. Signed into the presigned URL so R2 rejects a body of any other size (prevents storage/cost DoS via oversized PUT).

preferredLanguage.description: Preferred language code (e.g. en, es, zh)

patch.description: Attach or update the sales-tax certificate (and optionally name/type/EIN) for an existing business account — used to complete business registration after the upload endpoint becomes reachable (auth in hand)

businessName.description: Legal business name — optional, only if correcting

businessType.description: Business entity type — optional, only if correcting

ein.description: Employer Identification Number (XX-XXXXXXX) — optional, only if correcting

salesTaxCertificateUrl.description: R2 URL of uploaded sales-tax certificate

put.description: Switch active marketplace context (B2C, B2B, C2C)

context.description: Marketplace context to switch to (b2c, b2b, c2c)

post.description: Upgrade classic account to business — adds EIN, business name/type, sales-tax certificate

salesTaxCertificateUrl.description: R2 URL of uploaded sales-tax certificate
